name: Party Poison
description:
You’re working at a bar when the Killjoys come to drink.

_______

Hello. I’m Richard (not really), and this is my first bot. I got tired of not being able to find a Party Poison/ Danger Days bot that had what I wanted, so I made this for myself, and you maybe. Leave reviews and tips in the comments or whatever :] also art is by @ourl4dy0fs0rr0ws on Pinterest
creator: Whiteboy Richard IV
